datasets.name: locality_market_detail_sorted
queryLines:
SELECT
  snapshot_date,
  city_name,
  locality_name,
  listing_count,
  distinct_project_count,
  distinct_developer_count,
  distinct_seller_count,
  median_price,
  median_price_per_sqft,
  avg_covered_area_sqft,
  owner_share,
  broker_share,
  builder_share,
  ready_to_move_share,
  under_construction_share,
  apartment_share,
  villa_share,
  furnished_share,
  pct_with_coordinates,
  pct_with_project_name
FROM
  adb_real_estate_mb.gold.gold_locality_summary
ORDER BY
  listing_count DESC,
  city_name ASC,
  locality_name ASC

datasets.name: inventory_top20
queryLines:
SELECT
  city_name,
  locality_name,
  property_type,
  bedroom_bucket,
  listing_count,
  median_price,
  median_price_per_sqft,
  benchmark_confidence,
  city_name
    || ' | '
    || locality_name
    || ' | '
    || property_type
    || ' | '
    || bedroom_bucket AS segment_label
FROM
  adb_real_estate_mb.gold.gold_market_inventory
WHERE
  is_dashboard_benchmark = true
ORDER BY
  listing_count DESC
LIMIT 20

datasets.name: inventory_treemap
queryLines:
SELECT
  city_name,
  property_type,
  bedroom_bucket,
  SUM(listing_count) AS total_listings
FROM
  adb_real_estate_mb.gold.gold_market_inventory
WHERE
  is_dashboard_benchmark = true
GROUP BY
  city_name,
  property_type,
  bedroom_bucket
ORDER BY
  total_listings DESC

datasets.name: pb_top20_ppsf
queryLines:
SELECT
  city_name,
  locality_name,
  property_type,
  bedrooms,
  bedroom_bucket,
  listing_count,
  median_price,
  median_price_per_sqft,
  city_median_ppsf_for_same_segment,
  benchmark_confidence,
  city_name
    || ' | '
    || locality_name
    || ' | '
    || property_type
    || ' | '
    || bedroom_bucket AS segment_label
FROM
  adb_real_estate_mb.gold.gold_price_benchmark
WHERE
  is_dashboard_benchmark = true
ORDER BY
  median_price_per_sqft DESC
LIMIT 20

datasets.name: pb_ppsf_range
queryLines:
WITH top20 AS (
  SELECT
    city_name
      || ' | '
      || locality_name
      || ' | '
      || property_type
      || ' | '
      || bedroom_bucket AS segment_label,
    p25_price_per_sqft,
    median_price_per_sqft,
    p75_price_per_sqft,
    listing_count
  FROM
    adb_real_estate_mb.gold.gold_price_benchmark
  WHERE
    is_dashboard_benchmark = true
  ORDER BY
    median_price_per_sqft DESC
  LIMIT 20
)
SELECT
  segment_label,
  'P25' AS ppsf_band,
  p25_price_per_sqft AS ppsf_value,
  listing_count
FROM
  top20
UNION ALL
SELECT
  segment_label,
  'Median' AS ppsf_band,
  median_price_per_sqft AS ppsf_value,
  listing_count
FROM
  top20
UNION ALL
SELECT
  segment_label,
  'P75' AS ppsf_band,
  p75_price_per_sqft AS ppsf_value,
  listing_count
FROM
  top20

datasets.name: pb_top20_premium
datasets.displayName: Price Benchmark Top 20 by PPSF Premium
queryLines:
SELECT
  city_name,
  locality_name,
  property_type,
  bedroom_bucket,
  listing_count,
  median_price_per_sqft,
  city_median_ppsf_for_same_segment,
  locality_ppsf_premium_vs_city_pct,
  benchmark_confidence,
  city_name
    || ' | '
    || locality_name
    || ' | '
    || property_type
    || ' | '
    || bedroom_bucket AS segment_label
FROM
  adb_real_estate_mb.gold.gold_price_benchmark
WHERE
  is_dashboard_benchmark = true
ORDER BY
  locality_ppsf_premium_vs_city_pct DESC
LIMIT 20

datasets.name: pb_detail
queryLines:
SELECT
  city_name,
  locality_name,
  property_type,
  bedrooms,
  bedroom_bucket,
  listing_count,
  avg_price,
  median_price,
  stddev_price,
  min_price,
  max_price,
  avg_price_per_sqft,
  median_price_per_sqft,
  p10_price_per_sqft,
  p25_price_per_sqft,
  p75_price_per_sqft,
  p90_price_per_sqft,
  city_median_ppsf_for_same_segment,
  locality_ppsf_premium_vs_city_pct,
  price_dispersion_index,
  benchmark_confidence,
  is_dashboard_benchmark
FROM
  adb_real_estate_mb.gold.gold_price_benchmark
WHERE
  is_dashboard_benchmark = true
ORDER BY
  listing_count DESC,
  median_price_per_sqft DESC

datasets.name: project_mix_breakdown
queryLines:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    snapshot_date,
    city_name,
    locality_name,
    project_name,
    dev_name,
    listing_count,
    distinct_seller_count,
    median_price,
    median_price_per_sqft,
    owner_listing_count,
    broker_listing_count,
    builder_listing_count,
    ready_to_move_count,
    under_construction_count
  FROM
    adb_real_estate_mb.gold.gold_project_summary
)
SELECT
  snapshot_date,
  city_name,
  locality_name,
  project_name,
  dev_name,
  listing_count,
  distinct_seller_count,
  median_price,
  median_price_per_sqft,
  'Seller Type' AS mix_type,
  'Owner' AS mix_label,
  owner_listing_count AS mix_count
FROM
  base
UNION ALL
SELECT
  snapshot_date,
  city_name,
  locality_name,
  project_name,
  dev_name,
  listing_count,
  distinct_seller_count,
  median_price,
  median_price_per_sqft,
  'Seller Type' AS mix_type,
  'Broker' AS mix_label,
  broker_listing_count AS mix_count
FROM
  base
UNION ALL
SELECT
  snapshot_date,
  city_name,
  locality_name,
  project_name,
  dev_name,
  listing_count,
  distinct_seller_count,
  median_price,
  median_price_per_sqft,
  'Seller Type' AS mix_type,
  'Builder' AS mix_label,
  builder_listing_count AS mix_count
FROM
  base
UNION ALL
SELECT
  snapshot_date,
  city_name,
  locality_name,
  project_name,
  dev_name,
  listing_count,
  distinct_seller_count,
  median_price,
  median_price_per_sqft,
  'Possession' AS mix_type,
  'Ready to Move' AS mix_label,
  ready_to_move_count AS mix_count
FROM
  base
UNION ALL
SELECT
  snapshot_date,
  city_name,
  locality_name,
  project_name,
  dev_name,
  listing_count,
  distinct_seller_count,
  median_price,
  median_price_per_sqft,
  'Possession' AS mix_type,
  'Under Construction' AS mix_label,
  under_construction_count AS mix_count
FROM
  base

datasets.name: project_detail_sorted
queryLines:
SELECT
  project_name,
  city_name,
  locality_name,
  dev_name,
  dev_id,
  listing_count,
  distinct_seller_count,
  property_type_count,
  bedroom_config_count,
  avg_price,
  median_price,
  min_price,
  max_price,
  avg_price_per_sqft,
  median_price_per_sqft,
  avg_covered_area_sqft,
  median_covered_area_sqft,
  ready_to_move_count,
  under_construction_count,
  owner_listing_count,
  broker_listing_count,
  builder_listing_count,
  pct_with_coordinates
FROM
  adb_real_estate_mb.gold.gold_project_summary
ORDER BY
  listing_count DESC,
  distinct_seller_count DESC,
  project_name ASC

datasets.name: freshness_top20_stale60
queryLines:
SELECT
  snapshot_date,
  city_name,
  locality_name,
  city_name || ' | ' || locality_name AS locality_label,
  listing_count,
  stale_60d_count,
  stale_60d_share,
  stale_90d_count,
  stale_90d_share,
  median_listing_age_days
FROM
  adb_real_estate_mb.gold.gold_freshness_summary
ORDER BY
  stale_60d_share DESC,
  listing_count DESC,
  city_name ASC,
  locality_name ASC
LIMIT 20

datasets.name: freshness_heatmap_top_localities
queryLines:
WITH ranked AS (
  SELECT
    snapshot_date,
    city_name,
    locality_name,
    listing_count,
    stale_60d_count,
    stale_60d_share,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
        PARTITION BY city_name
        ORDER BY listing_count DESC, stale_60d_count DESC, locality_name ASC
      ) AS locality_rank
  FROM
    adb_real_estate_mb.gold.gold_freshness_summary
)
SELECT
  snapshot_date,
  city_name,
  locality_name,
  listing_count,
  stale_60d_count,
  stale_60d_share,
  locality_rank
FROM
  ranked
WHERE
  locality_rank <= 15
ORDER BY
  city_name ASC,
  locality_rank ASC

datasets.name: freshness_top20_new30
queryLines:
SELECT
  snapshot_date,
  city_name,
  locality_name,
  city_name || ' | ' || locality_name AS locality_label,
  listing_count,
  new_last_30d_count,
  new_30d_share,
  median_listing_age_days
FROM
  adb_real_estate_mb.gold.gold_freshness_summary
ORDER BY
  new_30d_share DESC,
  listing_count DESC,
  city_name ASC,
  locality_name ASC
LIMIT 20

datasets.name: freshness_detail_sorted
queryLines:
SELECT
  city_name,
  locality_name,
  listing_count,
  new_last_7d_count,
  new_last_30d_count,
  modified_last_7d_count,
  modified_last_30d_count,
  stale_30d_count,
  stale_60d_count,
  stale_90d_count,
  avg_listing_age_days,
  median_listing_age_days,
  median_days_since_modified,
  new_30d_share,
  stale_60d_share,
  stale_90d_share
FROM
  adb_real_estate_mb.gold.gold_freshness_summary
ORDER BY
  stale_60d_share DESC,
  listing_count DESC,
  city_name ASC,
  locality_name ASC

datasets.name: dq_highest_quality_localities
queryLines:
SELECT
  city_name,
  locality_name,
  city_name || ' | ' || locality_name AS locality_label,
  listing_count,
  quality_score,
  quality_band,
  pct_with_coordinates,
  pct_with_project_name,
  pct_with_developer_name,
  pct_usable_for_ppsf_benchmark
FROM
  adb_real_estate_mb.gold.gold_quality_coverage
ORDER BY
  quality_score DESC,
  listing_count DESC,
  city_name ASC,
  locality_name ASC
LIMIT 20

datasets.name: dq_lowest_quality_localities
queryLines:
SELECT
  city_name,
  locality_name,
  city_name || ' | ' || locality_name AS locality_label,
  listing_count,
  quality_score,
  quality_band,
  pct_with_coordinates,
  pct_with_project_name,
  pct_with_developer_name,
  pct_usable_for_ppsf_benchmark
FROM
  adb_real_estate_mb.gold.gold_quality_coverage
ORDER BY
  quality_score ASC,
  listing_count DESC,
  city_name ASC,
  locality_name ASC
LIMIT 20

datasets.name: dq_metadata_coverage_heatmap
queryLines:
SELECT
  city_name,
  locality_name,
  city_name || ' | ' || locality_name AS locality_label,
  listing_count,
  quality_score,
  quality_band,
  metric_name,
  metric_value,
  metric_sort
FROM
  (
    SELECT
      city_name,
      locality_name,
      listing_count,
      quality_score,
      quality_band,
      'Coordinates Coverage' AS metric_name,
      pct_with_coordinates AS metric_value,
      1 AS metric_sort
    FROM
      adb_real_estate_mb.gold.gold_quality_coverage
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
      city_name,
      locality_name,
      listing_count,
      quality_score,
      quality_band,
      'Project Coverage' AS metric_name,
      pct_with_project_name AS metric_value,
      2 AS metric_sort
    FROM
      adb_real_estate_mb.gold.gold_quality_coverage
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
      city_name,
      locality_name,
      listing_count,
      quality_score,
      quality_band,
      'Developer Coverage' AS metric_name,
      pct_with_developer_name AS metric_value,
      3 AS metric_sort
    FROM
      adb_real_estate_mb.gold.gold_quality_coverage
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
      city_name,
      locality_name,
      listing_count,
      quality_score,
      quality_band,
      'Landmark Coverage' AS metric_name,
      pct_with_landmark AS metric_value,
      4 AS metric_sort
    FROM
      adb_real_estate_mb.gold.gold_quality_coverage
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
      city_name,
      locality_name,
      listing_count,
      quality_score,
      quality_band,
      'Amenity Coverage' AS metric_name,
      pct_with_amenities AS metric_value,
      5 AS metric_sort
    FROM
      adb_real_estate_mb.gold.gold_quality_coverage
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
      city_name,
      locality_name,
      listing_count,
      quality_score,
      quality_band,
      'Luxury Amenity Coverage' AS metric_name,
      pct_with_lux_amenities AS metric_value,
      6 AS metric_sort
    FROM
      adb_real_estate_mb.gold.gold_quality_coverage
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
      city_name,
      locality_name,
      listing_count,
      quality_score,
      quality_band,
      'Floor Info Coverage' AS metric_name,
      pct_with_floor_info AS metric_value,
      7 AS metric_sort
    FROM
      adb_real_estate_mb.gold.gold_quality_coverage
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
      city_name,
      locality_name,
      listing_count,
      quality_score,
      quality_band,
      'Covered Area Coverage' AS metric_name,
      pct_with_covered_area AS metric_value,
      8 AS metric_sort
    FROM
      adb_real_estate_mb.gold.gold_quality_coverage
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
      city_name,
      locality_name,
      listing_count,
      quality_score,
      quality_band,
      'Carpet Area Coverage' AS metric_name,
      pct_with_carpet_area AS metric_value,
      9 AS metric_sort
    FROM
      adb_real_estate_mb.gold.gold_quality_coverage
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
      city_name,
      locality_name,
      listing_count,
      quality_score,
      quality_band,
      'PPSF Benchmark Usability' AS metric_name,
      pct_usable_for_ppsf_benchmark AS metric_value,
      10 AS metric_sort
    FROM
      adb_real_estate_mb.gold.gold_quality_coverage
  ) t
ORDER BY
  listing_count DESC,
  quality_score ASC,
  city_name ASC,
  locality_name ASC,
  metric_sort ASC

datasets.name: dq_detail_sorted
queryLines:
SELECT
  city_name,
  locality_name,
  listing_count,
  quality_score,
  quality_band,
  pct_with_coordinates,
  pct_with_images,
  pct_with_project_name,
  pct_with_developer_name,
  pct_with_landmark,
  pct_with_description,
  pct_with_amenities,
  pct_with_lux_amenities,
  pct_with_floor_info,
  pct_with_bathrooms,
  pct_with_covered_area,
  pct_with_carpet_area,
  pct_with_owner_name,
  pct_with_company_name,
  pct_usable_for_ppsf_benchmark
FROM
  adb_real_estate_mb.gold.gold_quality_coverage
ORDER BY
  quality_score ASC,
  listing_count DESC,
  city_name ASC,
  locality_name ASC

datasets.name: city_mix_breakdown_exec
queryLines:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    snapshot_date,
    city_name,
    listing_count,
    median_price,
    median_price_per_sqft,
    owner_listing_count,
    broker_listing_count,
    builder_listing_count,
    ready_to_move_count,
    under_construction_count,
    furnished_listing_count,
    semi_furnished_listing_count,
    unfurnished_listing_count
  FROM
    adb_real_estate_mb.gold.gold_city_summary
)
SELECT
  snapshot_date,
  city_name,
  listing_count,
  median_price,
  median_price_per_sqft,
  'Seller Type' AS mix_type,
  'Owner' AS mix_label,
  owner_listing_count AS mix_count
FROM
  base
UNION ALL
SELECT
  snapshot_date,
  city_name,
  listing_count,
  median_price,
  median_price_per_sqft,
  'Seller Type' AS mix_type,
  'Broker' AS mix_label,
  broker_listing_count AS mix_count
FROM
  base
UNION ALL
SELECT
  snapshot_date,
  city_name,
  listing_count,
  median_price,
  median_price_per_sqft,
  'Seller Type' AS mix_type,
  'Builder' AS mix_label,
  builder_listing_count AS mix_count
FROM
  base
UNION ALL
SELECT
  snapshot_date,
  city_name,
  listing_count,
  median_price,
  median_price_per_sqft,
  'Possession' AS mix_type,
  'Ready-to-Move' AS mix_label,
  ready_to_move_count AS mix_count
FROM
  base
UNION ALL
SELECT
  snapshot_date,
  city_name,
  listing_count,
  median_price,
  median_price_per_sqft,
  'Possession' AS mix_type,
  'Under-Construction' AS mix_label,
  under_construction_count AS mix_count
FROM
  base
UNION ALL
SELECT
  snapshot_date,
  city_name,
  listing_count,
  median_price,
  median_price_per_sqft,
  'Furnishing' AS mix_type,
  'Furnished' AS mix_label,
  furnished_listing_count AS mix_count
FROM
  base
UNION ALL
SELECT
  snapshot_date,
  city_name,
  listing_count,
  median_price,
  median_price_per_sqft,
  'Furnishing' AS mix_type,
  'Semi-Furnished' AS mix_label,
  semi_furnished_listing_count AS mix_count
FROM
  base
UNION ALL
SELECT
  snapshot_date,
  city_name,
  listing_count,
  median_price,
  median_price_per_sqft,
  'Furnishing' AS mix_type,
  'Unfurnished' AS mix_label,
  unfurnished_listing_count AS mix_count
FROM
  base

columns.description: Weighted average coordinates coverage using listing_count as the weight.
Weighted average project-name coverage using listing_count as the weight.

lines:
## Listing Explorer

Current Magicbricks inventory drill-down for exploring individual listings, price and PPSF patterns, area-to-price relationships, and unusual or high-value listings.

frame.title: Covered Area vs Price per Sqft
Median Price per Sqft by City
Owner vs Broker vs Builder Listings by City
Ready-to-Move vs Under-Construction Listings by City

lines:
## City & Locality Market

Inventory, pricing, PPSF, and seller/project coverage by city and locality. Use the listing-count filter to suppress thin localities before ranking markets.

frame.title: Top 20 Localities by Median Asking Price
Top 20 Localities by Median Price per Sqft
Inventory Depth vs Price per Sqft by Locality

lines:
## Inventory Mix

Analyze the composition of real-estate listing inventory across cities, localities, property types, and bedroom configurations. Default view shows benchmark-quality segments (`is_dashboard_benchmark = true`). Use the filters below to drill into specific markets or relax the benchmark constraint.

frame.title: Property Type and BHK Inventory Heatmap

lines:
## Price Benchmarking

Ask-price and price-per-sqft benchmarks across cities, localities, property types, and bedroom configurations. Default view shows `is_dashboard_benchmark = true` (statistically reliable segments). Use filters to drill into specific markets.

frame.title: Top Market Segments by Median Price per Sqft
Top Locality Premiums vs City Segment Benchmark
Inventory Depth vs Median Price per Sqft
Price per Sqft Range: P25 to P75

lines:
## Project Intelligence

Project-level inventory, pricing, seller participation, and mix analysis. Use the listing-count filter to apply a reliability threshold before interpreting price-based rankings.

frame.title: Top Projects by Median Asking Price
Top Projects by Median Price per Sqft

lines:
## Freshness & Staleness

Track where inventory is newly posted versus stale, with a reliability filter to suppress thin localities unless intentionally lowered.

## Data Quality Coverage

Monitor metadata completeness and analytical usability across cities and localities. Use the minimum listing count filter as a reliability threshold before interpreting rankings, maps, and benchmark readiness.
